query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up of a human eye fills most of the frame, with warm peach and cream tones dominating the image. A translucent overlay shows a secondary face—seemingly a man with short hair and visible shoulders—superimposed across the lower portion of the eye and surrounding skin. The background is a bright, washed white area on the left side. The iris appears dark with soft highlights, and eyelashes are faintly visible along the upper lid.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A dreamlike, double-exposed extreme close-up of a human eye with heavy blurring throughout, where a translucent, ghosted portrait of a man overlays the lower half of the eye like a fading memory. The image is washed out with muted, faded peach and cream tones, and the left side blows out into overexposed white. The overlapping exposures create an abstract, surreal dissolution of identity where facial features melt together, evoking melancholy and the fragility of recollection through its soft, unfocused haze.
